figures.caption: Fig. 2. An approximation of the ROA for systems (11) and (12) is computed (light green area) with collocation points sampled over [−0.15, 0.15]2 and [−0.08, 0.08]2 respectively. The exact ROA is delimited by the black curve. In (b), a better approximation of the ROA is obtained when the collocation points are sampled over the hypercube R) (dark green area).
